source_jobs.title: Key Account Manager (Sephora EU) (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YEPODA

 


CLEAN K-BEAUTY INNOVATION. NO COMPROMISES.

Yepoda is a clean K-Beauty brand that actually proves it works. We make Korean skincare without any of the compromises. Everything is clinically tested, 100% vegan, and formulated above EU standards. So you get the innovation and the results that K-Beauty is known for, plus a real commitment to sustainability. And we make it genuinely fun and easy to use — skincare you actually look forward to.

Founded in 2020 by Sander Joonyoung van Bladel and Veronika Strotmann, Yepoda is a certified B Corp™ and 1% for the Planet member, based in the heart of Berlin. Our products are available through our own online shop and, since March 2025, at Sephora Europe — online and in over 650 stores. With a team of 140+ brilliant individuals from around the world, we are actively shaping Yepoda's story every day.

 

We’re currently looking for a Key Account Manager to own and develop Yepoda’s strategic partnership with Sephora within the EU. This role will be fully dedicated to Sephora and will play a key part in driving our retail growth, brand visibility, and commercial performance across this channel.

 


YOUR TASKS

 - Own and manage Yepoda’s relationship with Sephora EU, acting as the main point of contact for all commercial and operational topics

 - Take full ownership of the Sephora account, acting as the single point of accountability for performance, strategy, and execution

 - Build and maintain strong relationships with Sephora buying, category, and retail teams

 - Lead all commercial discussions, including assortment, launch plans, promotional calendars, and growth opportunities

 - Proactively identify opportunities and drive initiatives forward without waiting for direction

 - Challenge and influence Sephora stakeholders to unlock commercial opportunities and ensure the best outcomes for Yepoda

 - Drive sales performance by monitoring KPIs, identifying opportunities, and building clear action plans

 - Ensure strong brand presence and execution across all Sephora touchpoints, both in-store and online

 - Collaborate with in-store teams to improve product visibility, merchandising, and customer experience

 - Work cross-functionally with Marketing, Supply Chain, Finance, and Product teams to ensure smooth execution of launches and campaigns

 - Manage forecasting and sell-through planning to ensure optimal stock levels and operational efficiency

 - Monitor competitor activity and category trends to strengthen Yepoda’s positioning

 - Ensure all initiatives are driven through to completion with clear timelines, accountability, and follow-through

 - Balance day-to-day operational execution with long-term strategic development of the Sephora partnership

 


YOUR PROFILE

 - Experience in key account management within beauty, retail, or trade marketing

 - Direct experience working with Sephora is highly preferred

 - Strong understanding of Sephora’s retail model, promotional calendar, and commercial KPIs

 - Strong commercial mindset with experience in negotiation, assortment planning, and retail growth strategies

 - Experience in stock and sales planning with a solid understanding of retail performance drivers

 - Strong analytical skills with the ability to turn data into clear actions

 - Experience working cross-functionally with marketing, supply chain, and product teams

 - Strong organisational and stakeholder management skills with the ability to take full ownership and drive topics independently

 - Comfortable challenging external partners and pushing initiatives forward in a structured and professional way

 - Demonstrated ability to combine operational execution with strategic thinking

 - Hands on, proactive approach with a strong sense of ownership

 - Experience working in fast paced environments where proactivity and accountability are critical

 - French language skills are a plus

 


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Dynamic Environment: The opportunity to work i

source_jobs.title: National Account Manager US Sephora (m/f/x)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YEPODA

 


CLEAN K-BEAUTY INNOVATION. NO COMPROMISES.

Yepoda is a clean K-Beauty brand that actually proves it works. We make Korean skincare without any of the compromises. Everything is clinically tested, 100% vegan, and formulated above EU standards. So you get the innovation and the results that K-Beauty is known for, plus a real commitment to sustainability. And we make it genuinely fun and easy to use — skincare you actually look forward to.

Founded in 2020 by Sander Joonyoung van Bladel and Veronika Strotmann, Yepoda is a certified B Corp™ and 1% for the Planet member, based in the heart of Berlin. Our products are available through our own online shop and, since March 2025, at Sephora Europe — online and in over 650 stores. With a team of 140+ brilliant individuals from around the world, we are actively shaping Yepoda's story every day.





COMPENSATION

The estimated base salary range for this position is $140,000 to $170,000 USD, depending on experience, skills, and qualifications. This role may also be eligible for performance-based bonus compensation.

 

As Yepoda prepares to launch with Sephora in the United States, we are looking for a National Account Manager, Sephora US to lead our strategic partnership with Sephora US and help drive our retail growth in this exciting new market.

 


YOUR TASKS

 - Own the relationship with Sephora US, serving as the main point of contact for commercial discussions, planning, and day-to-day account management

 - Lead commercial negotiations across assortments, launch plans, promotional calendars, and growth opportunities

 - Drive strong sales performance by analyzing retail KPIs, identifying risks and opportunities, and building action plans with Sephora

 - Develop account strategies across both in-store and online channels to support visibility, productivity, and brand growth

 - Partner closely with internal teams, including marketing, supply chain, finance, and product, to ensure smooth execution of launches and campaigns

 - Manage forecasting, sell-through analysis, and inventory planning to support healthy stock levels and operational excellence

 - Monitor market trends, competitor activity, and category developments to identify opportunities for growth within the US market

 - Support broader retail expansion initiatives, including new store launches, key activations, and strategic account opportunities

 


YOUR PROFILE

 - 8 to 10+ years of experience in national account management, key account management, retail partnerships, or commercial roles within beauty, skincare, or consumer brands

 - Direct experience working with major beauty retailers, ideally Sephora or other premium retail partners

 - Strong commercial and strategic mindset, with experience negotiating assortments, promotional calendars, and retail growth plans

 - Solid understanding of retail KPIs, forecasting, sales planning, and performance management

 - Experience working cross-functionally with marketing, supply chain, and finance teams

 - Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills

 - Excellent communication and relationship-building skills

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, growing business where priorities can move quickly

 - Must be based in the San Francisco Bay Area and able to work closely with our Berlin-based HQ across time zones

 - Must be authorized to work in the United States without current or future visa sponsorship





WHAT WE OFFER

 - The opportunity to play a key role in building Yepoda’s partnership with Sephora US from the ground up

 - A remote role based in the San Francisco Bay Area, with flexibility and autonomy in how you work

 - The chance to collaborate with an international team and travel occasionally to our headquarters in Berlin

 - Medical, dental, and vision coverage

 - 401(k)

 - Paid time off, paid holidays, and sick leave

 - Paid parental leave

 - Employee discounts on Yepoda products

 - A collaborative, inter

source_jobs.title: Influencer Marketing Manager (m/w/d) | Deutschsprachig
source_jobs.description:
ÜBER YEPODA

Clean K-Beauty Innovation. Ohne Kompromisse.

Yepoda ist eine Clean K-Beauty Brand, die hält, was sie verspricht. Wir entwickeln koreanische Hautpflege ohne Kompromisse: klinisch getestet, 100 % vegan und nach Standards formuliert, die über die EU-Anforderungen hinausgehen. So vereinen wir die Innovation und Wirksamkeit, für die K-Beauty bekannt ist, mit einem echten Engagement für Nachhaltigkeit. Und das Beste: Unsere Produkte machen Hautpflege einfach, effektiv und zu einem Ritual, auf das man sich jeden Tag freut.

Gegründet wurde Yepoda 2020 von Sander Joonyoung van Bladel und Veronika Strotmann. Als zertifizierte B Corp™ und Mitglied von 1% for the Planet haben wir unseren Hauptsitz im Herzen Berlins. Unsere Produkte sind über unseren eigenen Onlineshop erhältlich und seit März 2025 außerdem bei Sephora Europe – online sowie in über 650 Stores.

Mit einem internationalen Team von mehr als 140 talentierten Menschen gestalten wir die Geschichte von Yepoda jeden Tag aktiv weiter.

Für unser Team in Berlin suchen wir aktuell einen Senior Influencer Marketing Manager (m/w/d). In dieser Rolle verantwortest du ein Portfolio strategischer Creator-Partnerschaften für den deutschen Markt und trägst maßgeblich dazu bei, Umsatzwachstum, Markenbekanntheit und nachhaltigen Business Impact durch leistungsstarke Influencer-Kooperationen voranzutreiben.

Die Position ist ideal für Menschen mit ausgeprägtem „Business-Mindset“, die Freude an Verhandlungen haben, Wachstumspotenziale erkennen, strategische Beziehungen aufbauen und ambitionierte Ziele übertreffen möchten. Wir suchen jemanden, der Influencer Marketing nicht nur als Kampagnenkanal versteht, sondern als skalierbaren Wachstumstreiber für das Unternehmen.

 


DEINE AUFGABEN

 - Du verantwortest und entwickelst ein Portfolio strategischer Creator-Partnerschaften mit klar definierten Umsatz-, Performance- und Wachstumszielen.

 - Du identifizierst, akquirierst und gewinnst Creator-Kooperationen mit hohem Potenzial und messbarem Business Impact.

 - Du führst Vertrags- und Konditionsverhandlungen eigenständig und findest die richtige Balance zwischen nachhaltigem Beziehungsaufbau, Unternehmenszielen und Profitabilität.

 - Du baust langfristige Beziehungen zu Creator:innen, Agenturen und Partnern auf und pflegst diese mit einem klaren wachstumsorientierten Fokus.

 - Du steuerst Influencer-Kampagnen mit besonderem Fokus auf Performance, ROI, Reichweite, Engagement und Umsatzbeitrag.

 - Du analysierst die Performance von Kampagnen und Creator:innen und leitest daraus konkrete Optimierungs- und Skalierungsmaßnahmen ab.

 - Du erkennst neue Wachstumschancen, Creator-Trends und innovative Kooperationsmodelle im deutschen Markt frühzeitig.

 - Du arbeitest eng mit den Teams aus Paid Media, Brand, Creative und E-Commerce zusammen, um die Performance entlang des gesamten Funnels zu maximieren.

 - Du übernimmst Verantwortung für ambitionierte KPIs und entwickelst kontinuierlich neue Ansätze, um Ergebnisse weiter zu verbessern und Ziele zu übertreffen.
   
    


DEIN PROFIL

 - Du bringst 2–3 Jahre Berufserfahrung in den Bereichen Sales, Account Management, Partnership Management, Affiliate Marketing, Influencer Marketing, Media Sales oder vergleichbaren kommerziell geprägten Rollen mit.

 - Du verfügst über ein starkes „Business-Mindset“ und hast bereits Verantwortung für Umsatz-, Wachstums- oder Performance-Ziele übernommen.

 - Du überzeugst durch ausgeprägte Verhandlungsstärke und hervorragende Fähigkeiten im Aufbau langfristiger Beziehungen.

 - Du fühlst dich in dynamischen, zielorientierten Umfeldern wohl und arbeitest eigenverantwortlich sowie ergebnisorientiert.

 - Du kennst die deutsche Digital-, Creator- und Beauty-Landschaft sehr gut.

 - Du arbeitest datenbasiert, analysierst KPIs sicher und kannst Erkenntnisse in konkrete Maßnahmen übersetzen.

 - Du denkst unternehmerisch, erkennst Chancen frühzeitig und gehst Herausforderungen proaktiv an.

 - Du schaffst den

source_jobs.title: Senior Amazon Account Manager (m/f/d)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YEPODA



Clean K-Beauty Innovation. No compromises.

Yepoda is a clean K-Beauty brand that actually proves it works. We make Korean skincare without any of the compromises. Everything is clinically tested, 100% vegan, and formulated above EU standards. So you get the innovation and the results that K-Beauty is known for, plus a real commitment to sustainability. And we make it genuinely fun and easy to use — skincare you actually look forward to.

Founded in 2020 by Sander Joonyoung van Bladel and Veronika Strotmann, Yepoda is a certified B Corp™ and 1% for the Planet member, based in the heart of Berlin. Our products are available through our own online shop and, since March 2025, at Sephora Europe — online and in over 650 stores. With a team of 140+ brilliant individuals from around the world, we are actively shaping Yepoda's story every day.

We are seeking a Senior Amazon Account Manager to own and scale Yepoda's Amazon business internationally, including the US market. You will act as the in-house expert with full accountability for revenue, profitability, content, and operations. This role involves collaborating with Marketing, Operations, Supply Chain, Finance, and Customer Service to transform Amazon into a highly profitable, scaled growth channel.




YOUR TASKS

 - Own Yepoda's Amazon business across multiple markets, including Amazon US, with full accountability for channel performance

 - Manage the full Amazon P&L, steering revenue, margin, and profitability across markets

 - Define and execute the Amazon growth strategy across assortment, pricing, promotions, visibility, conversion, and expansion opportunities

 - Lead day-to-day account management and ensure smooth operational execution, including listing optimization, A+ content, Brand Store, and keyword strategy

 - Drive Amazon marketing initiatives including Sponsored Ads, promotions, deals, and Vine; plan and execute product launches, seasonal campaigns, and hero product moments

 - Partner with operations and supply chain on forecasting, replenishment, FBA shipments, and in-stock management

 - Work cross-functionally with finance, customer service, and compliance to support profitability tracking, customer experience, and regulatory requirements

 - Communicate directly with Amazon to resolve account health, policy, and operational issues and identify growth opportunities

 - Monitor key performance metrics and translate data into clear actions; stay current on Amazon tools, algorithm changes, and competitive developments




YOUR PROFILE

 - 5 to 7 years of relevant professional experience with strong hands-on responsibility for Amazon Seller Central, ideally at a D2C brand, aggregator, marketplace-first business, or high-growth consumer company

 - Proven track record of driving revenue growth and managing Amazon as a meaningful sales channel across multiple markets, ideally including Amazon US

 - Strong experience with P&L ownership and the ability to make data-driven decisions to balance growth and profitability

 - Deep understanding of Amazon fundamentals, including FBA operations, catalog management, listing optimization, SEO, PPC, promotions, account health, and marketplace analytics

 - Strong command of key Amazon performance metrics such as revenue, margin, ACoS, TACoS, RoAS, conversion rate, traffic, and inventory health

 - Experience working cross-functionally with marketing, operations, supply chain, customer service, finance, and compliance

 - Strong stakeholder management skills and the ability to influence and align multiple teams around shared channel goals

 - Highly analytical, structured, and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a complex international environment

 - Fluent in English

 - Interest in skincare, beauty, wellness, or lifestyle brands is a plus




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Dynamic Environment: The opportunity to work in a start-up environment surrounded by a passionate and dedicated team

source_jobs.title: Influencer Marketing Manager ES Market (m/f/d) (1-year fixed term)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YEPODA

Clean K-Beauty Innovation. No compromises.

Yepoda is a clean K-Beauty brand that actually proves it works. We make Korean skincare without any of the compromises. Everything is clinically tested, 100% vegan, and formulated above EU standards. So you get the innovation and the results that K-Beauty is known for, plus a real commitment to sustainability. And we make it genuinely fun and easy to use — skincare you actually look forward to.

Founded in 2020 by Sander Joonyoung van Bladel and Veronika Strotmann, Yepoda is a certified B Corp™ and 1% for the Planet member, based in the heart of Berlin. Our products are available through our own online shop and, since March 2025, at Sephora Europe — online and in over 650 stores. With a team of 140+ brilliant individuals from around the world, we are actively shaping Yepoda's story every day.

We are currently looking for an Influencer Manager - ES Market to join our Berlin team on a 12-month fixed-term contract. In this role, you will own and grow a portfolio of strategic creator partnerships in the Spanish market, driving revenue growth, brand visibility, and business impact through high-performing influencer collaborations.

This position is ideal for someone with a strong commercial mindset who enjoys negotiations, identifying growth opportunities, building strategic relationships, and outperforming targets. We are looking for someone who thinks beyond campaign execution and approaches influencer marketing as a scalable growth channel.




YOUR TASKS

 - Own and grow a portfolio of strategic creator partnerships with clear performance and revenue targets.

 - Identify, prospect, and close high-potential influencer partnerships that drive measurable business impact.

 - Lead negotiations independently, balancing strong relationship management with business objectives and profitability.

 - Build long-term relationships with creators, agencies, and partners while maintaining a strong commercial mindset.

 - Drive influencer campaigns with a strong focus on performance, ROI, reach, engagement, and revenue contribution.

 - Analyze campaign and creator performance, identifying opportunities to improve efficiency and scale results.

 - Proactively identify new growth opportunities, creator trends, and partnership models within the Spanish market.

 - Collaborate closely with Paid Media, Brand, Creative, and E-Commerce teams to maximize country performance across the full funnel.

 - Take ownership of ambitious KPIs and continuously look for ways to outperform targets and improve business results.
   
   


YOUR PROFILE

 - 2-3 years of experience in Sales, Account Management, Partnerships Management, Affiliate Marketing, Influencer Marketing, Media Sales, or similar commercially-driven roles.

 - Proficient in English and Spanish with excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

 - Strong commercial mindset with proven experience owning revenue, growth, or performance-related targets.

 - Excellent negotiation and relationship-building skills.

 - Comfortable operating in fast-paced, target-driven environments with high ownership and accountability.

 - Strong understanding of the Spanish digital, creator, and beauty landscape.

 - Data-driven and performance-oriented, with the ability to analyze KPIs and translate insights into actions.

 - Entrepreneurial mindset with a proactive approach to identifying opportunities and solving problems.

 - Ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on execution.

 - Previous experience in DTC, Beauty, FMCG, Lifestyle, creator economy, or high-growth environments is a strong plus.
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Dynamic Environment: The opportunity to work in a start-up environment surrounded by a passionate and dedicated team.

 - Accelerate Your Career: Take on responsibility from day 1, with room for professional growth and advancement as the company continues to expand.

 - Inspiring Workspace: Located in the heart

notes: All job postings are sales or marketing roles, indicating a sales-heavy primary function.
